task_completion.description: Navigate to the GL Journal window in iDempiere.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere application is open in a browser with the 'GL Journal' window or tab active.

task_completion.description: Create the GL Journal header with the correct description and currency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GL Journal record exists with the Description field containing 'Q1 Marketing Campaign - Digital Advertising' and Currency set to USD.

task_completion.description: Add a debit line for Media Advertising.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A journal line is visible in the lines tab showing Account '62100' (or Media Advertising) with a Debit amount of 3500.00.

task_completion.description: Add a credit line for the Checking Account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A journal line is visible in the lines tab showing Account '11100' (or Checking Account) with a Credit amount of 3500.00.
The GL Journal entry shows a Document Status of 'Completed' or 'CO', indicating it has been successfully posted.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the iDempiere web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the iDempiere ERP system, not terminal commands or API scripts executing the task.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual iDempiere application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard iDempiere layout (menus, tabs, fields), not a text editor or a mock webpage.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a blank file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected description and amounts are entered into the correct input fields within the iDempiere GL Journal forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected journal description is exactly 'Q1 Marketing Campaign - Digital Advertising'. The expected amount for both debit and credit lines is 3500.00. After posting, the document status should show as 'Completed' or 'CO' in iDempiere.
